entry.title: GWAC 47QTCH18D0028 (P00006) awarded to INNOVATIVE MANAGEMENT CONCEPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD IS TO EXERCISE THE OPTION PERIOD 2/23/2023-2/22/2028. THIS VENDOR HAS REREPRESENTED AND IS NOW OTHER THAN SMALL (OTS) UNDER NAICS 541512. THIS VENDOR IS ONLY ELIGIBLE FOR LOGICAL FOLLOW-ON EXCEPTION FAR 16.505(B)(2)(I)(C)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCH18D0028 (P00007) awarded to INNOVATIVE MANAGEMENT CONCEPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD IS TO INCORPORATE FAR 52.204-27, PROHIBITION ON A BYTEDANCE COVERED APPLICATION (JUN 2023) TO ALL VETS 2 CONTRACTS AS A RESULT OF FAC 2023-04. THIS APPLIES TO ALL FUTURE ORDERS AGAINST THIS CONTRACT.
